sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mawhna a neite hong pai in
A ma thupha bel up ciang in

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A mah muang in, A mah muang la

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nuamna a hong pia ding Jesuh
Vuk sang in hong ngo zaw sak thei

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nop na sung tun’ na ding
Jesuh Thumaan lam pi a hi
Lung dam na ngah ding hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Mi siang tho kikhopna mun leh
Lung dam om tawn tung na sung ah
